title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.270 - Ordinary execution to issue, when
text:
524.270.  Ordinary execution to issue, when. — When the judgment for the plaintiff is only for damages and costs, execution may be had thereon, as on judgments in other civil actions.
(RSMo 1939 § 1546) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1382; 1919 § 1832; 1909 § 2399
